untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'news events' and 'rational valuation gaps' which are not available as indicators in the allowed set. The concept of anchoring bias and gap-to-rational-value estimation cannot be directly operationalized without external news data and fundamental value estimates. Approximated using price drift (ATR > 2 stddev threshold) and volume confirmation instead, but this is a lossy translation of the original behavioral finance concept.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using: (1) 50-bar SMA as anchor point proxy; (2) ATR > 2.0 as drift magnitude threshold (substitute for 2 stddev drift); (3) vol_ratio_20 > 1.0 for volume confirmation; (4) body_pct > 0.8 as reversal candlestick approximation; (5) 60-bar max hold period per spec. Original signal fundamentally requires news event detection and fundamental valuation inputs not available in technical indicator set.
